infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Lenz needs access to your camera to record videos.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Lenz needs access to your location to show nearby videos and tag your posts.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Lenz needs access to your microphone to record audio for videos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Lenz needs access to your photo library to select videos.
